question: Which types of questions have 3 or more questions? Return the questions type code.
sql: SELECT q.Type_of_Question_Code FROM Questions q JOIN Questions_in_Exams qie ON q.Question_ID = qie.Question_ID GROUP BY q.Type_of_Question_Code HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3;

back_translation.intent: 统计满足条件的特定类型问题代码

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求返回具有3或更多问题的类型代码，但SQL反向翻译描述中未包含过滤条件（如COUNT(*) >= 3）和排序/限制条件，无法准确满足原始问题的语义。
